# Lindcott Armory

> Personal firearm management app for Android and the web.

Lindcott Armory is a mobile and web application that helps gun owners manage their collection, track range sessions, monitor ammo inventory, and analyze shooting performance.

## Features

- **Gun Vault**: Catalog your firearms with make, model, caliber, action type, status, photos, and notes.
- **Range Session Log**: Record every range trip — rounds fired, location, date, and session notes.
- **Ammo Inventory (Arsenal)**: Track ammo lots by caliber, brand, grain weight, bullet type, quantity on hand, and purchase price.
- **Target Analysis**: Upload target photos and calculate shot group statistics — MOA, extreme spread, CEP, and standard deviation.
- **Armory Assistant**: AI-powered assistant scoped to your vault data and general firearms questions.
- **Field Guide**: Reference content covering calibers, optics, competition formats, marksmanship fundamentals, and ballistics.

## Platform

- Android app: available on Google Play (package: com.lindcottarmory.app)
- Web app (PWA): https://lindcottarmory.com

## Brand

Lindcott Armory is a product of Lindcott Farms.

## Contact

https://lindcottarmory.com
